summary: Brand Preview feature testing complete. All 12 features verified working correctly. Two-column layout on desktop with live preview panel showing 3 tabbed mockups (Portfolio, Quote, Portal). Settings modal widens to max-w-5xl when Brand tab is active. Real-time color/font updates working.

issues: Welcome tour modal occasionally appears on top of Settings modal - may slightly interfere with user experience but closes normally with Escape

passed_tests: Brand Settings opens with two-column layout (settings left, preview right) on desktop - VERIFIED
Preview panel has 3 tabs: Portfolio, Quote, Portal - all clickable - VERIFIED
Portfolio preview shows: header with logo/name, gallery grid, featured badge, CTA button - all in brand colors - VERIFIED
Quote preview shows: header, line items table, total row, Accept/Message buttons - all in brand colors - VERIFIED
Portal preview shows: gradient header, status timeline with progress, action cards, Contact button - all in brand colors - VERIFIED
Changing palette instantly updates both the preview AND the background app colors - VERIFIED
Changing font updates preview mockup text - VERIFIED
Preview tabs switch correctly between Portfolio/Quote/Portal views - VERIFIED
Settings modal widens when Brand tab is active (max-w-5xl), narrows for other tabs (max-w-2xl) - VERIFIED
LIVE PREVIEW indicator dot visible with pulsing animation - VERIFIED
Save Brand and Reset buttons work correctly - VERIFIED
All existing Brand Settings functionality preserved (color pickers, font selector, logo upload) - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: BrandPreview component properly uses inline styles for preview elements to avoid CSS variable feedback loops
All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for automated testing
Two-column responsive layout implemented with lg:flex-row and lg:w-[320px]
Modal width transition uses duration-300 for smooth animation between tabs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand Preview feature fully implemented and tested. Key data-testids: brand-preview-panel, preview-tab-portfolio, preview-tab-quote, preview-tab-portal, preview-portfolio, preview-quote, preview-portal. The celebration modal for 'quote_accepted' fires on first dashboard load - dismiss with [data-testid='celebration-close'] or button:has-text('Awesome!'). Settings gear icon is clickable via JS evaluation looking for SVG path patterns. Welcome tour modal may appear but can be dismissed with Escape key.
